# conn_comp { #neuroim.conn_comp }

```python
conn_comp(
    x,
    threshold=0,
    cluster_table=True,
    local_maxima=True,
    local_maxima_dist=15,
    connect='26-connect',
)
```

Find connected components in an image.

This function identifies and labels spatially connected regions in
neuroimaging data, supporting both binary masks and thresholded volumes.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name              | Type                                     | Description                                                                                | Default        |
|-------------------|------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------|
| x                 | [NeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.NeuroVol`) | The image object                                                                           | _required_     |
| threshold         | [float](`float`)                         | Threshold defining lower intensity bound for image mask. Default is 0.                     | `0`            |
| cluster_table     | [bool](`bool`)                           | Whether to return cluster statistics table. Default is True.                               | `True`         |
| local_maxima      | [bool](`bool`)                           | Whether to compute local maxima within clusters. Default is True.                          | `True`         |
| local_maxima_dist | [float](`float`)                         | Minimum distance between local maxima in mm. Default is 15.                                | `15`           |
| connect           | [str](`str`)                             | Connectivity pattern: "26-connect", "18-connect", or "6-connect". Default is "26-connect". | `'26-connect'` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                            | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | [ConnCompResult](`neuroim.connected_components.ConnCompResult`) | Object containing: - index: ClusteredNeuroVol with cluster labels - size: NeuroVol with cluster sizes - voxels: List of cluster voxel coordinates - cluster_table: DataFrame with cluster statistics (if requested) - local_maxima: Array of local maxima coordinates (if requested) |

## R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::conn_comp
